message:
🐛 Fix label-helper workflow permissions (#82)

Move permissions to top level and add secrets: inherit
to match the working pattern from greetings.yml.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@ on:
 
 permissions:
   contents: read
+  issues: write
+  pull-requests: write
 
 jobs:
   label-helper:
     uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-label-helper.yml@main
-    permissions:
-      issues: write
-      pull-requests: write
+    secrets: inherit
